creator: j.m.cooper@borgsdemons.com
text:
I have an HP Pavillion dv9000 (dv9420us).  I have a similar experience,
but I've also found a work-around.

If, when the the BIOS Splash screen is just about to disappear, one
starts pressing <spacebar>, then the boot slice prompt comes up.  Press
<enter> and the laptop boots normally.  It's a big hassle, but it works.

jmc
